The HHA must be acting upon a plan of care as described in §30.2, and a physician or 
allowed practitioner certification or recertification that meets the requirements of the 
following sections in order for HHA services to be covered. 

30.5.1 - Physician or Allowed Practitioner Certification 

(Rev. 10438, Issued: 11-06-20, Effective: 03-01-20, Implementation: 01- 11-21) 

A certification (versus recertification) is considered to be anytime that a Start of Care
